title: Nato and EU condemn Russia after drone hits Romanian residential block
summary_full: Romania says the Russian drone was likely hit over Ukraine by its air defences and altered its trajectory.
summary_public: Romania says the Russian drone was likely hit over Ukraine by its air defences and altered its trajectory.
